sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns: So, have you been listening to any new artists lately?
Yeah, I've been really into Billie Eilish and Tame Impala recently.
Oh cool, I love Billie Eilish too! Have you seen her live before?
No, unfortunately not yet. I've heard amazing things about her concerts though.
Definitely check it out if you get the chance. Any other music genre you enjoy?
Absolutely, I also really enjoy hip hop and old school R&B.
Nice, me too! Do you have a favorite rapper or singer in those genres?
Kendrick Lamar and Drake are definitely up there for me. As for R&B, I'd say R Kelly and Usher.
Ah, good choices! What about you? Who do you like in those genres?
For hip hop, I'd say J. Cole and Kanye West are some of my favorites.
Yes, they're great! How about R&B singers?
I really enjoy the vocal range of Ne-Yo and Chris Brown. They both put on incredible live performances.
Agree, they're fantastic performers. Well, we seem to have quite similar tastes in music.
Indeed we do! It's always nice to find someone who shares the same musical preferences.
Exactly, it makes for fun discussions and shared memories around music.
Absoluteley. Music has a unique ability to connect people, doesn't it?
It sure does. That's one of the many reasons why it holds such a special place in so many people's hearts.
Couldn't agree more! Well, it looks like our time has come to an end.
Already? Time flies when you're chatting about something you love!
Isn't that the truth? Yes, it seems our call has come to a close.
Thanks for the lovely conversation! Great chatting with you!

Likewise, take care! Bye for now. <3

[Call ends here.]
